Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff'S Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-25-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT EDITH SALVATORE's Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff'S Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's unopposed "motion to dismiss plaintiff's complaint" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2024 Continued To Mar-27-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-18-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
ARLEN LITMAN-CLEPER, ESQ. CESARI, WERNER AND MORIARTY (650) 991-5126 alitman@cwmlaw.com
Attorneys for Defendant EDITH SALVATORE
No other appearances.

Matter is not contested. No argument is held. Counsel makes his apperance out of an abundance of caution. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EDITH SALVATORE's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Edith Salvatore's unopposed "motion to strike plaintiff's complaint" is granted with leave to amend.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

Off Calendar Dec-18-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
ARLEN LITMAN-CLEPER, ESQ. CESARI, WERNER AND MORIARTY (650) 991-5126 alitman@cwmlaw.com
Attorneys for Defendant EDITH SALVATORE
No other appearances.

Matter is not contested. No argument is held. Cousel make his apperance out of an abundance of caution. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EDITH SALVATORE's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Edith Salvatore's unopposed demurrer is sustained with leave to amend.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Oct-13-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Mia Morgan White, 831-295-9904 Pro Per Plaintiff.
Jeffrey Woo, Esq. CESARI, WERNER AND MORIARTY (650) 991-5126 jwoo@cwmlaw.com or Defendant EDITH SALVATORE. (via ZOOM)

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT EDITH SALVATORE MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is taken under submission.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
